commit.subject: LU-16518 llite: fix new clang error in statahead.c
commit.message:
LU-16518 llite: fix new clang error in statahead.c

New clang error:

 statahead.c: warning: variable 'rc' is used uninitialized
   whenever 'if' condition is false [-Wsometimes-uninitialized]
     if (lli->lli_sa_pattern == LSA_PATTERN_NONE ||
         ^~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
 statahead.c: note: uninitialized use occurs here
     if (rc)
         ^~
 statahead.c: note: remove the 'if' if its condition is always
   true
     if (lli->lli_sa_pattern == LSA_PATTERN_NONE ||
     ^~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
 statahead.c:: note: initialize the variable 'rc' to silence
   this warning
     int rc;
          ^
           = 0

Fixes: 1288681 ("LU-14361 statahead: add statahead advise IOCTL")
Test-Parameters: trivial
Signed-off-by: Timothy Day <timday@amazon.com>
Change-Id: I5b0011e02355f1b391cbada09478d8c922241906
